final:
module top_module(
    input     wire        A,
    input     wire        B,
    input     wire        VPWR,
    input     wire        VGND,
    output    reg         Y
);// Implement NOR2 gate logic
    assign Y = ~(A | B);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y <= A & B;
    end
  end

endmodule
